title: Pactoria Modpack
description: A modpack (not currently official but soon hopefully) for the minecraft server pactoria!
body:
### NON OFFICIAL
Hiya there, I'm FightinFlamez. Since the recent start of the Pactoria server, I've wondered what mods people use. What is fair? Is it fair because everybody has it? does everybody have it? So that's what led me here. With Code (owner) signing off on all the mods here I have decided to post this so we can all have mods that are staff approved. If you have any issues **DO NOT** go to pactoria staff. DM me on discord (fighting_flamez).

### MOD LIST

# Optimization
1. Dynamic FPS
2. Enhanced Block Entities
3. Entity Culling
4. ImmediatelyFast
5. Indium
6. Lithium
7. Modern Fix
8. Nvidium*
9. Sodium
*Nvidium is only for NVIDIA gpus, if you do not have one feel free to remove it.

# QOL
1. AppleSkin
2. Better Tab
3. Bobby
4. CalcMod
5. Controlify
6. Controlling
7. Debugify
8. Essential Mod
9. FastQuit
10. Gamma Utils
11. Jade
12. Litematica
13. Mod Menu
14. More Chat History
15. ReplayMod
16. Simple Voice Chat
17. Xaeros Minimap
18. Xaeros World Map
19. Zoomify

# RP/Aesthetic
1. Capes
2. Chat Heads
3. FabricSKyboxes
4. Fabrishot
5. Figura
6. Iris Shaders
7. Model Gap Fix
8. Not Enough Animations
9. Spyglass Astronomy

# Library/Mod Dependencies
1. Cloth Config API
2. Fabric API
3. Fabric Language Kotlin
4. MaLiLib
5. Searchables
6. Text Placeholder API
7. YetAnotherConfigLib

# MISC
1. EMF
2. ETF
3. Animatica
4. Cit Resewn


If you never played this server before you can find the website [here](https://pactoria.net/) and the discord is attachted!

Mods Approved by: Code
  Endorsed by [Frediii](https://www.youtube.com/@frediiiYT)
  ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e528bf3d399df5c47c003e1f15ea003e6b6c715d.png)![approved]
Endorsed by John Pactoria
![pactoriajohn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d629350af2988bdceb8a8151c8107ab175c7db6.png)
